message:
Fix TCP operator shutdown behavior

Make accept_tcp drain structurally during finalize instead of
relying on ad-hoc completion checks. The operator now stops
accepting new connections, tracks a draining lifecycle, and
finishes once all accepted work has been released.

Also let cancellation propagate in from_tcp and serve_tcp,
and guard to_tcp's shared transport state so reconnects and
subpipeline writes cannot race.
